title: sanguisorba minor subsp. polygama
intro: Sanguisorba minor subsp. polygama, also known as Red Elder or Red Sorrel, is a plant species in the rose family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a styptic and astringent, to stop bleeding and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Sanguisorba minor subsp. polygama include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce menstrual cramps, and lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
